key_advice: Upgrade turret and chip for main attack hero first

week_1.priority: Build Titanium Alloy Factory, upgrade Furnace, capture first Dig Site

week_2.priority: Expand territory, upgrade Furnace, build Military Bases

week_3.priority: Choose faction (Rebels or Gendarmerie) - determines Rare Soil War opponents

week_4.priority: Rare Soil War begins - upgrade Alliance Furnace, coordinate alliance

week_6.priority: Push Faction Award points, defend Alliance Furnace

week_7.priority: Faction Duel - 4v4 Capitol Conquest, final ranking

week_8.priority: Season ends - Transfer Surge available based on rank

how_to_increase: Ask allies for Recon Plan (heats to 40C)

fast_growth_tips: Kill highest Doom Walker on day 1 for coal
Claim Dig Site hourly coal daily

star_thresholds.4_stars: Unlocks Super Sensory: +20% HP/Attack/Defense and +10% skill speed

hero_progression.critical_rule: NEVER assume or invent a hero star count. Always use the exact star level shown in the player profile.
